message:
feat(gui): add native event bridge emitter for ft watch integration (ft-1memj.4)

Implements the emitter side of the native event bridge in frankenterm-gui.
On startup, the GUI connects to the ft watch daemon's Unix domain socket
and pushes mux events (pane output, state changes, user vars, pane
lifecycle) as newline-delimited JSON WireEvents.

Key design decisions:
- Bounded channel (1024) with try_send for backpressure (drop on full)
- Dedicated sender thread with exponential backoff reconnection
- Hello handshake on connect with protocol version
- Graceful degradation: returns None if socket not available
- Auto-discovery: tries default /tmp/wa/events.sock even without config

Also makes WireEvent and WirePaneState public with Serialize derive
in frankenterm-core so the GUI crate can construct and serialize them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
